source_name: Code4rena Noya Findings and Analysis Report (2024-04)
summary: _getPositionTVL from SiloConnector calculates wrongly the position’s TVL thus affecting the share price at which shares are minted / redeemed from the protocol.
root_cause: connector TVL accounting omits or misvalues part of the external protocol position, causing vault share price and position value to be wrong
broken_invariants: the vault path must not allow the condition described by "SiloConnector _getPositionTVL miscalculate the TVL position" to change user balances, collateralization, or protocol availability unexpectedly
oracle, TVL, and collateral valuation must use correctly scaled, fresh, and manipulation-resistant inputs
users must retain a reliable exit path unless an explicitly designed and validated pause or restriction is active
attack_preconditions: the affected component is deployed or configured in the way described by the final report
the report-described user, keeper, vault, connector, oracle, or liquidation flow is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, keeper, liquidator, vault participant, or protocol-integrated actor able to trigger the affected flow
trigger_actions: execute the report-described function sequence or state transition
observe mispricing, accounting drift, value loss, fund lock, or denial of service

impact.description: _getPositionTVL from SiloConnector calculates wrongly the position’s TVL thus affecting the share price at which shares are minted / redeemed from the protocol.

why_not_higher: already classified as High in the final C4 report
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with public report evidence and affected code/finding references
common_false_positive_angles: verify the same component and configuration are in scope
check whether the issue is reachable by an untrusted or economically motivated actor
confirm the impact is more than a view-only mismatch, dust loss, or privileged-only misconfiguration
mitigations: In the for loop, after you got the share tokens balances with balanceOf: - convert all 3 share tokens balances to underlying token (eg. underlyingTotalDeposits, underlyingCollateralOnlyDeposits, underlyingBorrowAmount) - sum underlying deposits : underlyingTotalDeposits = underlyingTotalDeposits + underlyingCollateralOnlyDeposits - get the price of the underlying asset - calculate the totalDepositAmount and totalBAmount using the calculated underlyingTotalDeposits and underlyingBorrowAmount and price.
